name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Unix)
notes: This building block detects programs run as Root or another user.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when Audit ID (custom) not equals Effective User ID (custom)
when the event matches User ID (custom) is any of [0 or 100]
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [su or sudo or sh or bash]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Run as Superuser or Another User (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when Audit ID (custom) not equals Effective User ID (custom)
AND NOT when the event matches User ID (custom) is any of [0 or 100]
AND NOT when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [su or sudo or sh or bash]
